name: Full Consensus with Patient Bid Shape Confirmation
hypothesis: The parent spec's 'full consensus' formula is extremely powerful. This mutation adds a book shape condition (bid_depth_concentration < 0.2) to confirm that the strong bid-side pressure is supported by 'patient' liquidity distributed across the book rather than a fragile, concentrated BBO, which should increase signal robustness.
formula: ((obi_1 + obi_ex_bbo) - 2 * ask_depth_concentration) > 1.5 AND zscore(trade_imbalance_signed, 300) > 0.1 AND bid_depth_concentration < 0.2
mutation_note: The time-of-day filter on this powerful parent failed. This attempts a different type of filter, using book shape to gate entries, aiming to improve consistency without decimating the trade count.
